name: establish-single-search-index-writer
title: Establish Single Search Index Writer
description: Make IndexingRuntime the sole semantic mutation path and one dedicated writer the owner of shared FTS writes and DDL.
scope: IndexingRuntime store boundary, search-index worker/service ownership, File/App FTS mutation migration, DDL readiness, and checkpoint contract
creator: TalexDreamSoul
notes: Code implementation and all isolated verification gates are complete. Real-profile SQLite/FTS/schema operations and packaged-profile diagnostics remain separately approval-gated, so the task stays in progress until that evidence is recorded.

meta.nextAction: Obtain explicit approval for packaged/real-profile indexing diagnostics evidence, then record the final acceptance and archive after a user-directed work commit.
meta.blocker: No code or isolated-verification blocker. Only approval-gated packaged/real-profile diagnostics evidence remains.
meta.evidence: 540 focused indexing/provider tests passed, including runtime -> legacy -> runtime rollback; CoreApp node and web type-checks passed; scoped ESLint and Prettier passed; electron-vite build passed; isolated copy-execute FTS ownership simulation passed with source unchanged and legacy file_fts retained; final three-reviewer panel reported no blockers.
